# JFeelgood

> Original paintings, mixed media, and fine art by JFeelgood — an Austin, Texas-based artist with over 18 years of creative work across hundreds of paintings, five published books, five music albums, and a video game.

JFeelgood creates one-of-a-kind original artworks that explore identity, resilience, solitude, ego, and the human experience. Each piece is a singular original — never reproduced. Work spans acrylic, mixed media, gold leaf, epoxy resin, spray paint, and found materials on canvas and wood.

## Paintings for Sale

- [Poetry of Solace](/paintings/poetry-of-solace): $900. 16×20 in. Acrylic on canvas. A solitary figure on a glowing pathway beneath a star-studded sky. From the series "The Lost." Featured in *Thought Entropy*.
- [Adonis](/paintings/adonis): $400. 16×20 in. Acrylic on canvas. A stylized face in soft muted tones against vibrant yellow. Single blue tear. Explores emotion, identity, and vulnerability.
- [Veritas](/paintings/veritas): $1,200. 24×30 in. Mixed media on canvas. A transparent princess figure on stage against an abstract explosion of color. Themes: authenticity vs. societal expectation.
- [Path of Privilege](/paintings/path-of-privilege): $2,000. 12×12 in, depth 4 in. Mixed media on wood — gold leaf, epoxy resin, affixed paintbrushes. Commentary on race, systemic inequality, and privilege.
- [The Mother Essence](/paintings/mother-essence): $5,000. 36×36 in. Acrylic, latex, spray paint, acetone, found paper on hand-stretched canvas. Created 2011. From the private *Past & Future* series. One-of-one; previously sold and repurchased by the artist.

## Collections

- [Past & Future](/collections/past-and-future): Private fine art series. Large-scale mixed media works created with acrylic, latex, spray paint, and acetone. Includes The Mother Essence, Ancestors, Sisters, The Father Piece, and The Two Brothers.
- [Ascension](/collections/ascension): 2021 fine art series. Four acrylic-on-canvas works using intentional constraints — two colors per piece, bold minimal composition. First shown at Austin Studio Tour 2021 at Central Machine Works.
- [Self Work](/collections/self-work): 2021 fine art series. Eight of ten mixed media works exploring ego, identity, and sobriety. Acrylic on canvas with epoxy resin finish. An ongoing visual journal — pieces nine and ten remain unfinished because self work is never done.
- [Marbled Falls](/collections/marbled-falls): A series of smaller original works (sold). Includes Doggo, Kitten, Golden Sands, Catching Feels, Dino, Unlocked, VHS.

## About the Artist

JFeelgood has over 18 years of experience across painting, mixed media, sculpture, writing, music, and game design. He has produced several hundred original paintings, five published books, five music albums, and a video game. He has organized community art events and served in leadership roles at art organizations.

In 2019 JFeelgood chose sobriety — from alcohol, cigarettes, self-medication, and the life he had been living — and channeled that transformation into the Self Work series. His practice is rooted in accountability, introspection, and the belief that powerful messages need very little to convey their strength.

His book *Thought Entropy* is available on Amazon and features paintings from multiple series including The Lost, Past & Future, and others.

## Press

"Jonny's wisdom and insight belie his youthful appearance; his still waters run seriously deep." — The Confounded Cook, 2011, Gallery Off Broadway. Interview by Crystal Pratt.

## Optional

- [Thought Entropy on Amazon](https://www.amazon.com): JFeelgood's book featuring paintings from multiple series.
- [iExploreart.com](https://iexploreart.com): Extended painting descriptions and editorial coverage.
